message:
fix(control_plane): resolve E0502 borrow-checker error in key_role_separation bind()

Extract existing binding data via .map() before calling self.push_event()
to avoid holding an immutable borrow of self.active while mutably
borrowing self. Fixes compile failure introduced in f824316.

bd-2wqb

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
